name: .NET Misconfiguration: Use of Impersonation
description: A .NET application uses impersonation to execute with the authenticated user's identity, relying solely on NTFS directory and file permissions for access control instead of application-level security checks, potentially enabling privilege escalation.
detection_pattern: AUTH node enables impersonation in .NET configuration, allowing TRANSFORM nodes to execute with escalated privileges based on EXTERNAL user identity without CONTROL node enforcing application-level authorization checks
